updateMessage: Adds experimental England 2026/27 personal tax rules, including the Personal Allowance taper, Class 1 National Insurance, CGT, and ISA wrappers.

incomeTax.name: Income Tax
incomeTax.tooltip: England and Northern Ireland income tax bands, with the Personal Allowance modeled as a tapered pre-bracket deduction.

socialContributions.name: National Insurance
socialContributions.tooltip: Class 1 employee National Insurance using the standard annual category A thresholds. Category letters, exact payroll-period mechanics, and exact cohort/date-based state pension cutoffs are not modeled.

capitalGainsTax.name: CGT
capitalGainsTax.tooltip: Approximate UK Capital Gains Tax using the higher main rate and annual exemption. Real UK CGT depends on remaining basic-rate band headroom and asset type.

helpText.label: Pensions
helpText.contributionDescriptionP1:
Enter how much of the annual allowance you want to contribute from salary into a private pension.

Use the GOV.UK annual allowance guidance if you need to check high-income tapering.
helpText.contributionDescriptionP2:
Enter how much of your partner's annual allowance you want to contribute from salary into a private pension.

Use the GOV.UK annual allowance guidance if you need to check high-income tapering.
helpText.statePensionDescriptionP1:
Enter your expected weekly State Pension amount.

Use your latest GOV.UK State Pension forecast or provider estimate.
helpText.statePensionDescriptionP2:
Enter your partner's expected weekly State Pension amount.

Use their latest GOV.UK State Pension forecast or provider estimate.

investmentTypes.label: Reporting Funds
investmentTypes.helpText: Approximation of UK reporting funds and reporting ETFs. Gains are taxed under Capital Gains Tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage}; non-reporting offshore funds are not modeled separately.

investmentTypes.label: Shares
investmentTypes.helpText: Direct shareholdings are taxed under Capital Gains Tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage}. The real UK rate can be lower when unused basic-rate band remains.

investmentTypes.label: Stocks and Shares ISA
investmentTypes.helpText: Stocks and Shares ISAs are modeled as tax-free for capital gains with a modeled annual subscription limit and UK-residency contribution eligibility.

investmentTypes.label: RSUs
investmentTypes.helpText: Restricted Stock Units are taxed as employment income at vesting. Later sale gains are taxed under Capital Gains Tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage}.
